prestazioni: AM29 6.0L V12 (AE31) twin-turbo conversion using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with billet compressor wheels, custom 42mm wastegates, and a bespoke Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate setup, paired with a Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU running custom fuel and ignition maps for 900+ hp on E85 fuel, with a reinforced ZF 8HP90X transmission upgraded with a Level 10 torque converter and a Quaife ATB differential

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapović with 3.5-inch mandrel-bent piping, quad 100mm carbon-fiber tips, and a valved bypass system controlled by a Motec C125 dash, featuring a custom X-pipe design to optimize scavenging for the AM29 V12’s firing order

Ohlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, custom valving for the Taraf’s aluminum-intensive chassis, and spherical bearing top mounts, paired with a full polybush kit from SuperPro (part #SPF1000K) and a custom front strut tower brace by Cusco (model #604 540 A) to eliminate flex under high-G cornering
estetica: Full carbon-fiber widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS Taraf-specific kit, part #LB-ASTON-TARAF), featuring extended front fenders with integrated air vents, a custom rear diffuser with active aerodynamics, and a 3-piece carbon-fiber rear wing with adjustable Gurney flaps (designed in collaboration with APR Performance)

Custom 22-inch forged wheels by HRE (model FF16, 9.5x22 ET30 front, 12x22 ET40 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/22 front, 325/25/22 rear), with a bespoke gold-bronze finish and center-lock adapters for rapid wheel changes

Full bespoke interior by Sabelt, featuring a 6-point harness (model 6SF) with FIA-approved HANS compatibility, carbon-fiber Recaro Pole Position seats (part #R-2080) with Alcantara suede and Taraf-specific embroidery, and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (model #SD08) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360)
